verification_gate: Authority and capability assignments resolve machine-readably; no agent has unlimited authority; approval and escalation gates are explicit and proven.
proof_summary: Authority and capability assignments resolve machine-readably: agent/role/capability examples validate; the executor agent carries a bounded 'cecca-delegated' authority scope (no unlimited authority); Role.escalation_to is a required, populated field; and the verifier agent's boundary rules explicitly forbid executing the task it verifies.

live_commands.purpose: Validate examples against schemas, checksum spine docs 00..09, and evaluate this task's gate
